description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on push and pull request events across three jobs: ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest. In each job, check out the repository and perform specific build and test steps. On ubuntu-latest, install required libraries, build and run tests with make -j4, and run a fuzz test target. On macos-latest, build and run tests with make -j2. On windows-latest, configure Git, check out the repository, set up MSBuild, build the test solution with msbuild.exe, and run the test executable.
